scope: standard EP hot-helper compact-row materialization gate

problem.old_contract: helper execution chose expected row grouping from hot_split_weight_layout_effective
problem.failure_mode: dispatcher could materialize owner_compact helper rows, but helper execution expected selected row groups and would not consume the owner_compact materialized path with selected hot weights.

patch.behavior: decouple hot_split_row_group_layout from hot_split_weight_layout_effective; when row_group_layout is owner_compact and weight layout is selected, reorder selected hot weights into compact owner order before grouped_mm.
patch.gradient_contract: index_select routes grouped_mm gradients back to selected-hot order, then existing _StandardEPHotWeightBroadcast backward reduces hot-weight grads.

validation.local_import_smoke_reason: local macOS Python environment does not have torch installed; remote/container e2e gate still required.

next_e2e_gate.shape: 8xMI350 S4096 GBS128 MBS4 FSDP8 EP8 flash12 standard-EP top8 SDMA hot-weight, no activation checkpointing
next_e2e_gate.reason: do-sonle5-mi350-gpu and do-vunguyen-mi350-gpu were occupied by an external two-node TorchTitan FT workload using all GPUs.

decision.read: This fixes the compact-row materialization gate so a future e2e A/B is meaningful. It is not itself a promoted performance result.
